summary: Completed testing of new features: Image Upload API and QR Code generation. All 29 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing confirms both features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/upload - valid PNG image upload returns URL
Backend: POST /api/upload - rejects invalid file types (.txt)
Backend: GET /api/tables/{id}/qr - returns QR code data with base64 image
Backend: GET /api/tables/{id}/qr - returns 404 for non-existent table
Backend: GET /api/tables/{id}/qr - menu_url format is correct
Backend: GET /api/tables/{id}/qr/download - returns 404 for non-existent table
Frontend: Menu page - Add item dialog has ImageUpload component
Frontend: Menu page - Image upload area shows 'Нажмите для загрузки или перетащите файл'
Frontend: Menu page - Shows file format info (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP до 5MB)
Frontend: Menu page - Has URL input field for manual URL entry
Frontend: Settings -> Tables - QR code button in table actions
Frontend: Settings -> Tables - QR dialog opens with table info
Frontend: Settings -> Tables - QR code image displayed
Frontend: Settings -> Tables - Menu URL displayed correctly
Frontend: Settings -> Tables - Download PNG button present
Frontend: QR code URL leads to correct public menu page
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Image Upload API (POST /api/upload) with validation for file type and size. 2) QR Code generation (GET /api/tables/{id}/qr) returning base64 PNG. Frontend ImageUpload component in Menu dialog and QR code modal in Settings->Tables both working correctly.
